code:
import io
import string

fn bat(_ s: String, _ i: Int) -> Int
  match string.byte_at(s, i)
  when Some(b)
    b
  when None
    -1
  end
end

fn is_ws(_ c: Int) -> Bool
  c == 32 or c == 9 or c == 10 or c == 13
end

fn is_digit(_ c: Int) -> Bool
  c >= 48 and c <= 57
end

fn abs_int(_ x: Int) -> Int
  if x < 0
    -x
  else
    x
  end
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end

  let n = string.len(line)
  mut i = 0
  mut have = false
  mut best = 0
  mut best_abs = 0

  while i < n
    let c = bat(line, i)
    if is_ws(c)
      i = i + 1
    else
      mut sign = 1
      if c == 45
        sign = -1
        i = i + 1
      else if c == 43
        i = i + 1
      end
      mut val = 0
      mut reading = true
      while reading
        if i < n
          let d = bat(line, i)
          if is_digit(d)
            val = val * 10 + (d - 48)
            i = i + 1
          else
            reading = false
          end
        else
          reading = false
        end
      end
      let signed = val * sign
      let a = abs_int(signed)
      if not have
        have = true
        best = signed
        best_abs = a
      else if a < best_abs
        best = signed
        best_abs = a
      end
    end
  end

  print("min_abs=#{best}")
end
